summary: Re-verified all 4 fixes from iteration_1 plus regressions. ALL 4 FIXES PASS. Backend 19/19 pytest still green. FIX1 (comment submit button) — submit btn at x=1697 clear of Emergent badge, normal click posts comment successfully. FIX2 (post-register redirect) — new user lands at /app/board/proj_<auto-id> with 4 columns rendered, NO 'Project not found' error. FIX3 (workspace name) — new user shows 'Newie's Workspace' in topbar AND sidebar (not 'LinearSync'). FIX4 (PillEditor dropdown right-aligned) — Status dropdown stays inside viewport on initial open AND on re-open (right=1759 / 1775 of vw=1920), status change to 'Backlog' works. Regressions: demo login lands on LinearSync/Core Platform, 25 seeded cards present, New Issue creation works, sidebar Sign out redirects to /login.

issues: Open dropdown overlay (fixed inset-0 z-10 at TaskDetailPanel.jsx:368) only closes via click on the overlay or selecting an option — no Escape key handler. Minor a11y nit, not blocking. Selecting an option DOES close the dropdown correctly.
A React console warning observed: 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute' — some is rendered with empty src; harmless but should pass null instead.

action_items: All four reported bugs from iteration_1 are fully resolved. No blocking issues remain.
(Optional) Add Escape-key handler to close PillEditor dropdown for better keyboard a11y.
(Optional) Fix the empty 'src' attribute warning by passing null/undefined instead of empty string.
(Optional, from prior iteration code review) Split server.py (~775 lines) into routers/, models/, deps/, seed/ modules; tighten CORS_ORIGINS for production (cannot be '*' with credentials).
critical_code_review_comments: TaskDetailPanel PillEditor: backdrop div (line 368) lacks Escape keydown handler — minor a11y gap.
AppShell loads workspace via GET /api/workspaces/current correctly; topbar and sidebar names now match dynamic workspace.
AppIndex.jsx correctly auto-creates an Inbox project when GET /api/projects returns empty, then navigates to it — verified end-to-end.
test_credentials: demo@taskflow.com / demo1234 (admin) — working. Plus on-the-fly registered test_new_<ts>@example.com / password123 for new-user flow.
seed_data_creation: Created two test tasks on demo board (TEST_NewIssue_<ts>, TEST_NI_<ts>) and one auto-registered user (test_new_1779185314@example.com) with its auto-created Inbox project. Demo board now shows 26 cards instead of 25 due to these test additions — harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iteration_1 fixes verified PASS. Backend 19/19 still green. Two minor non-blocking nits: (a) PillEditor lacks Escape handler — clicking overlay or selecting option closes it fine; (b) empty img src console warning. If running my Playwright again, do NOT use keyboard.Escape to close the PillEditor — click outside it or pick an option, otherwise the overlay stays and blocks subsequent clicks. Sprint 1+2 MVP is in a shippable state.
rca of the issue: N/A — all previously-reported bugs are fixed. The only behavioural quirk observed (Escape not closing PillEditor) is a missing keydown handler in TaskDetailPanel.jsx PillEditor component, not a regression.
